action_text: Press Enter in the global search box to run the search for "Incidents by agent"
rationale: We’ve already typed the report title into the global search; pressing Enter will execute the search and likely surface the report to open.

action_text: Click the global search magnifying glass to run the search
rationale: If Enter doesn’t trigger the search, clicking the search icon next to the global search field should perform the search.

action_text: Click the “results” item in the global search suggestions
rationale: The dropdown shows a “results” option; selecting it may navigate to the full search results where the report can be selected.

action_text: Replace the global search text with "Incidents by Assigned to"
rationale: If the current query doesn’t match the report, refine it to the more typical ServiceNow title “Incidents by Assigned to” and then search.

action_text: Replace the global search text with "Number of incidents by agent"
rationale: Try an alternative likely title phrasing to improve the chance of finding the correct report before executing the search.
